audience: Global professional audience, researchers, product teams, and technically literate stakeholders
style_system: Minimalist modern flat keynote system: Apple keynote-like restraint, Bauhaus geometric clarity, constructivist composition, Swiss-grid discipline, generous whitespace, crisp international sans-serif typography, restrained neutral palette with one intentional accent.
detail_strategy: Cover and closing are sparse; method and evidence slides use moderate structured labels and flat diagrams; avoid dense document-like paragraphs.

slides.title: From Documents to Visual Narrative
slides.message: Complex source materials can become clear, memorable presentation images.
slides.image_prompt: Create one 16:9 presentation slide image. Scenario: international professional briefing. Audience: global professional audience. Slide role: cover. Core message: complex source materials can become clear, memorable presentation images. Detail level: low. Exact text to render, no extra words: "From Documents to Visual Narrative" and "Image-based deck workflow". Visual design: minimalist modern flat keynote cover, abstract documents transforming into clean geometric presentation frames. Composition: large title, small subtitle, strong flat visual anchor, generous whitespace. Style system: Apple keynote-like restraint, Bauhaus geometry, constructivist composition, Swiss-grid discipline, crisp international typography. Constraints: readable, polished, no watermark, no fake logos, no stock-photo cliché.

slides.title: The Communication Gap
slides.message: Raw materials are dense, heterogeneous, and hard to present directly.
slides.image_prompt: Create one 16:9 presentation slide image. Scenario: international professional briefing. Audience: global professional audience. Slide role: context. Core message: raw materials are dense, heterogeneous, and hard to present directly. Detail level: medium. Exact text to render, no extra words: "The Communication Gap", "Dense information", "Mixed formats", "High editing cost". Visual design: flat geometric diagram showing PDFs, notes, tables, and images converging into a bottleneck. Composition: title top-left, three labeled factors, clean central visual. Style system: minimalist modern flat design, Apple keynote restraint, Bauhaus geometry, Swiss grid. Constraints: readable, no clutter, no fake UI, no stock imagery.

slides.title: Workflow
slides.message: The reusable loop is extraction, synthesis, planning, generation, and delivery.
slides.image_prompt: Create one 16:9 presentation slide image. Scenario: international professional briefing. Audience: technical and professional audience. Slide role: method. Core message: the reusable loop is extraction, synthesis, planning, generation, and delivery. Detail level: high. Exact text to render, no extra words: "Workflow", "Extract", "Synthesize", "Plan", "Generate", "Deliver". Visual design: clean five-step flat process diagram with strong alignment and concise labels. Composition: spacious horizontal or circular flow, projection-friendly labels, no tiny text. Style system: Apple keynote-like restraint, Bauhaus/constructivist geometry, Swiss-grid discipline, restrained accent color. Constraints: no watermark, no clutter, no glossy 3D.

slides.title: What Improves
slides.message: Visual structure improves comprehension only when accuracy remains intact.
slides.image_prompt: Create one 16:9 presentation slide image. Scenario: international professional presentation. Audience: global professional audience. Slide role: evidence. Core message: visual structure improves comprehension only when accuracy remains intact. Detail level: medium. Exact text to render, no extra words: "What Improves", "Faster comprehension", "Clearer story", "Accuracy first". Visual design: flat before/after information design, dense source blocks reorganized into a clean visual structure. Composition: one dominant comparison with three takeaway labels. Style system: minimalist modern flat, constructivist balance, Swiss typography, restrained palette. Constraints: no invented metrics, no clutter.

slides.title: Use Cases
slides.message: The same workflow adapts to research, training, technical reviews, and product storytelling.
slides.image_prompt: Create one 16:9 presentation slide image. Scenario: international professional presentation. Audience: mixed global professional audience. Slide role: comparison. Core message: the same workflow adapts to research, training, technical reviews, and product storytelling. Detail level: medium. Exact text to render, no extra words: "Use Cases", "Research talk", "Training", "Technical review", "Product story". Visual design: flat branching map from one workflow core to four use-case nodes. Composition: centered core, four balanced branches, clear labels. Style system: Apple keynote restraint, Bauhaus geometry, Swiss-grid discipline. Constraints: readable, balanced, no stock imagery.

slides.title: Principle
slides.message: The goal is not decoration; it is a repeatable visual communication system.
slides.image_prompt: Create one 16:9 presentation slide image. Scenario: international professional closing slide. Audience: global professional audience. Slide role: closing. Core message: the goal is not decoration; it is a repeatable visual communication system. Detail level: low. Exact text to render, no extra words: "Principle", "Accurate", "Reusable", "Presentation-ready". Visual design: calm minimalist closing slide with geometric visual motif and three keywords. Composition: large title, three supporting words, generous whitespace. Style system: minimalist modern flat keynote, Apple-like restraint, Bauhaus geometry, constructivist composition. Constraints: no clutter, no extra text.
